stemHtml: Which of these statements on shock stall is correct?

options.a: Shock stall is a stall due to flow separation at high angles of attack.
options.b: Shock stall is caused by sudden loss of lift due to a rise in load factor.
options.c: Shock stall is a stall due to flow separation caused by a shock wave.
options.d: C<sub>LMAX</sub> does not change as the Mach number increases.
